title: Extended Thinking 与普通响应的区别

dimensions.name: 推理深度
dimensions.a: 单次生成，适合简单问答和创意写作
dimensions.b: 多步深度推理，适合数学、编程、复杂分析

dimensions.name: 响应结构
dimensions.b: content 中先有 thinking block，再有 text block

dimensions.name: 延迟与成本
dimensions.b: 更慢、thinking tokens 计入输出 token 费用

dimensions.name: 透明度
dimensions.b: 可以看到（部分或全部）思考步骤

dimensions.name: API 限制
dimensions.a: 可用 temperature、top_p 等采样参数
dimensions.b: temperature 必须为 1，不能用 top_k/top_p

dimensions.name: Reasoning depth
dimensions.a: Single-pass generation; suitable for simple Q&A and creative writing
dimensions.b: Multi-step deep reasoning; ideal for math, coding, and complex analysis

dimensions.name: Response structure
dimensions.b: content contains thinking blocks first, then text blocks

dimensions.name: Latency & cost
dimensions.b: Slower; thinking tokens count toward output token billing

dimensions.name: Transparency
dimensions.b: Partial or full visibility into thinking steps

dimensions.name: API constraints
dimensions.a: Can use temperature, top_p, and other sampling params
dimensions.b: temperature must be 1; top_k/top_p not allowed
